title: E-Commerce Analytics Dashboard
description: Interactive data dashboard for tracking product sales and customer lifetime value.
fullDescription: A comprehensive internal tool built with React and Python that takes raw sales data and transforms it into actionable insights. Features include real-time data streaming, interactive charts, and predictive analytics for inventory management.

title: Customer Churn Prediction Model
description: Machine learning model predicting customer churn with 92% accuracy.
fullDescription: Developed and deployed a Random Forest classification model to identify at-risk customers. Integrated with the company's CRM to send automated retention offers.
